title: Hooks, Permissions, and Safety
description: Control what agents can do in your repo with permission models, hooks, and sandboxing

lessons.title: Why Safety Matters
lessons.description: The risks of autonomous code changes and why guardrails are non-negotiable

lessons.title: Permission Models
lessons.description: Understanding allowlists, deny patterns, and the permission hierarchy

lessons.title: The Hooks System
lessons.description: Pre-tool and post-tool hooks for validating, logging, and controlling agent actions

lessons.title: Sandboxing and Isolation
lessons.description: Git worktrees, containers, and other isolation patterns for safe agent execution

lessons.title: Designing Your Safety Framework
lessons.description: Hands-on: building a complete permission and hook configuration for your project
